description: Fragment of a letter from Malij in Lower Egypt to a Nagid informing him that Yosef the proselyte was received in town with due honor. He had left some codices with the Nagid and another scholar, which he now wanted back. (Information from Goitein's index cards)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מ-Malīj. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
